interactions.name: Handle Signup Form Submit

__ID_1__.name: Set form attempted
__ID_1__.description: Mark form as attempted to show validation messages
__ID_1__.__wwdescription: Mark form as attempted to show validation messages

__ID_2__.name: Clear previous error
__ID_2__.description: Clear any previous authentication error message
__ID_2__.__wwdescription: Clear any previous authentication error message

__ID_4__.name: Check form validity
__ID_4__.description: Verify all fields are valid and passwords match
__ID_4__.__wwdescription: Verify all fields are valid and passwords match

__ID_5__.description: Attempt to create new user account
__ID_5__.__wwdescription: Attempt to create new user account

__ID_7__.name: Reset loading state
__ID_7__.description: Disable loading state after validation failure
__ID_7__.__wwdescription: Disable loading state after validation failure

__ID_ERROR_1__.name: Set error message
__ID_ERROR_1__.varValue: Email already exists or is invalid
__ID_ERROR_1__.description: Display error message for existing/invalid email
__ID_ERROR_1__.__wwdescription: Display error message for existing/invalid email

__ID_ERROR_2__.name: Show error message

error.code: return { message: 'Email already exists or is invalid' }

__ID_ERROR_2__.description: Display the error message to user
__ID_ERROR_2__.__wwdescription: Display the error message to user

interactions.description:
Handles signup form submission with validation and error handling:

  1. Sets form loading state and attempt flag
  2. Validates all fields and password matching
  3. Attempts Supabase signup
  4. Shows error message for existing email
  5. Only navigates on successful signup

_ww-text_text.en: Copyright © 2025 DapUp. All rights reserved.
